name: Reversals (count)
description:
Number of direction reversals per worm, shown as box-and-whisker per group. A reversal is detected when the dot product of consecutive velocity vectors is negative (angle > 90°), with a minimum displacement of 2 px per frame to ignore jitter. Mirrors the built-in Reversals plot.

Requires the second-order engine: vx and vy are computed as frame-to-frame differences (diff), and prev_vx/prev_vy carry those values one frame forward to allow the dot product to be evaluated.
